description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a matte black finish, featuring three vertically stacked drawers on its front face. The drawers are equipped with geometric, recessed handles that blend seamlessly into the cabinet's modern design. The sides and back are plain, with no visible features or embellishments, emphasizing its utilitarian style. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, with a solid, sturdy build suitable for storing documents or office supplies. The drawers are deep and spacious, with one shown partially open, revealing the interior storage space. Its minimalist appearance and robust construction make it ideal for use in professional or urban environments.
description: A matte black, metal filing cabinet with three drawers and recessed handles, designed for secure document storage. Its minimalist, sturdy build is ideal for urban or office settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, solid black panel with one drawer partially open, revealing the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three drawers with geometric recessed handles, and the middle drawer open, highlighting the storage compartments.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a plain black panel and the open drawer visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a completely featureless, flat black surface with no visible openings or handles.
